name: 6pk 0.5" D Ring Binder Black - up&up™: Vinyl Hard Cover, 120 Sheet Capacity, 4 Internal Pockets, 3 Ring
description:
It's easy to keep a variety of important school or work papers organized and neatly contained with this 6-Pack of 0.5" Black D-Ring Binders from up&up™. These half-inch black D-ring binders are a great size for organizing a single subject of school work, household instruction manuals or other important papers you want to keep together and easy to access. Plus, clear pockets on the cover and spine make it easy to create custom labels so you can quickly identify what's inside. Each D-ring binder holds 120 sheets of paper, and they're designed with four clear interior pockets for additional convenient storage.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
